name: ext-obj-core
description: Object storage core: canonical object metadata, request/response envelopes, and logical driver interface.
docs:
Object storage core for X07 services.

Modules:
- std.obj
- std.obj.spec

Usage:
- Add dependency: x07 pkg add ext-obj-core@0.1.1
- Bind logical object stores like obj.documents in the service manifest.
- Decode operation results with std.obj.spec.resp_is_ok_v1 and std.obj.spec.resp_ok_payload_v1.
